task_completion.description: Configure the scene units to Metric (Millimeters).
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Blender's Properties editor, under the Scene Properties tab, the 'Unit System' should be set to 'Metric' and 'Length' should be set to 'Millimeters'.

task_completion.description: Create a cylindrical base with a diameter of 40mm and a height of 5mm.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A cylinder object is visible in the 3D viewport. In the Transform sidebar (N-panel) or object properties, its dimensions should be X: 40mm, Y: 40mm, Z: 5mm.

task_completion.description: Add the Suzanne monkey head and scale it to a height of 60mm.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Suzanne monkey head is visible in the 3D viewport. In the Transform sidebar (N-panel), its Z dimension should be exactly 60mm.

task_completion.description: Position Suzanne on top of the base and combine them into a single mesh.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 3D viewport, Suzanne is sitting directly on top of the cylinder. In the Outliner (top right), there should be only one combined mesh object representing both, rather than separate 'Suzanne' and 'Cylinder' objects.

task_completion.description: Export the model as an STL file with a scale where 1 unit equals 1 millimeter.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Blender STL Export dialog is open. The 'Scale' setting in the export options (usually on the right side) is visible and configured to match the 1 unit = 1 mm requirement.
The file path in the Blender export dialog or a subsequent terminal/file manager window shows the file being saved exactly to '/home/ga/BlenderProjects/suzanne_print.stl'.

integrity.description: Agent used the Blender GUI to create and modify the 3D models.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Blender interface actively being used (menus open, objects selected in the viewport, properties being edited) rather than just running a Python script from the terminal.

integrity.description: Agent actually performed the modeling steps rather than loading a pre-made file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Progressive screenshots show the addition of the cylinder, the addition of Suzanne, scaling, and joining, rather than a completed model suddenly appearing.

integrity.description: Agent used the actual export functionality of Blender.
integrity.visual_evidence: The official Blender 'Export STL' file browser window is visible, showing the correct path being typed or selected.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The final combined model should have a total Z-height of 65.0mm (60mm Suzanne + 5mm base) and a base diameter of 40.0mm. The output must be exactly at '/home/ga/BlenderProjects/suzanne_print.stl'.
